Let me read through the passage again to make sure I understand the details. So, the story starts by saying that on January 12 at 4:53 pm, Jens was at his desk in the Christopher Hotel in Port-au-Prince. When he felt a tremor, four seconds later the earthquake hit. Then he says he considered whether to run for the door or hide under his desk. The door was closed, and he thought it was too far and might get caught in falling debris, so he hid under the table.
